changes.note: Q1 revenue +53% YoY, adjusted EPS +63%, backlog $2.6B, organic orders +40%. Re-rating started but estimates are rising faster than the stock.
Q1 revenue beat, AI packaging portfolio expected to triple in 2026, and $2.5-3B capex plan confirms advanced-packaging bottleneck exposure.
Backlog increased to $48.5B and EPS guidance was raised. Quality is recognized, so entry remains neutral.
Data Center segment and spin-off path confirm thesis, but execution/event risk keeps it Watch on pullback.
Blackwell demand and May 20 earnings setup confirm thesis, but valuation and binary event risk keep new entry cautious.
Raised AI networking target and $5.4B deferred revenue confirm demand; valuation keeps it Watch on pullback.
